footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã chỉ tiêu %s1 đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục chỉ tiêu ngân sách.' else N'The article code %s1 is invalid or already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã chỉ tiêu %s1 đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The record consisting of code %s1 has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select 1 from @@table where ((ma_ct like rtrim(@ma_ct) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_ct) like rtrim(ma_ct) + '%')) begin select 'ma_ct' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_ct)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_ct = $ma_ct.OldValue) begin select 'ma_ct' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s1', rtrim($ma_ct.OldValue)) as message return end if @ma_ct <> $ma_ct.OldValue begin if exists(select 1 from @@table where ((ma_ct like rtrim(@ma_ct) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_ct) like rtrim(ma_ct) + '%') and ma_ct <> $ma_ct.OldValue) begin select 'ma_ct' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_ct)) as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_ct = @ma_ct
